category_sources: source_facts.description says Salesforce development toolkit; official Salesforce page says Salesforce CLI is a single command-line interface for Salesforce DX features: https://developer.salesforce.com/tools/salesforcecli
display_name_sources: Official Salesforce page title and heading use Salesforce CLI: https://developer.salesforce.com/tools/salesforcecli
docs_sources: Official Salesforce CLI page links the Salesforce CLI Setup Guide and Salesforce CLI Command Reference as documentation resources: https://developer.salesforce.com/tools/salesforcecli
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository salesforcecli/cli describes itself as the sf cli and has Salesforce CLI topics: https://github.com/salesforcecli/cli
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Salesforce development; official Salesforce CLI page describes Salesforce DX CLI; official repository topics include cli and salesforce: https://github.com/salesforcecli/cli
